name: Silent Insect
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>静寂虫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サイレント・インセクト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card is changed to Defense Position when it is Normal Summoned or Flip Summoned. Negate the effects of all Continuous Spell Cards and Continuous Trap Cards.
mnst_eff: This card is changed to Defense Position when it is Normal Summoned or Flip Summoned. Negate the effects of all Continuous Spell Cards and Continuous Trap Cards.

mst: Negates the effects of Spell Cards
